case_title: WIMAN BEVERAGE COMPANY, INC. VS BRAD LEVA, IND & DBA INTERMEZZO (EXPRESSO BAKER)

docket_entries.description: SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT BRAD LEVA, IND & DBA INTERMEZZO (EXPRESSO BAKER)

MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,716.50 FILED BY WIMAN BEVERAGE COMPANY, INC. AS TO DEFENDANT BRAD LEVA, IND & DBA INTERMEZZO (EXPRESSO BAKER) ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR NOV-01-1994 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 06

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF WIMAN BEVERAGE COMPANY, INC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BRAD LEVA, IND & DBA INTERMEZZO (EXPRESSO BAKER) $1,366.50 PRINCIPAL, $75.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,441.50, CASE SETTLED STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
